name: patchbook
description: Verification-signal knowledge base for agent workflows with evidence-backed solutions

scripts.validate: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const api=require('./dist/patchbook'); for (const f of ['dist/patchbook/index.js','dist/patchbook/index.d.ts','hooks/hooks.json','skills/patchbook/SKILL.md']) fs.accessSync(f); if (typeof api.postQuestion !== 'function' || typeof api.saveDashboard !== 'function') process.exit(1);"

author: Michael
